exploration_notes: Implemented a complete camel-fix component for FIX protocol messaging. Created 6 main Java classes (FixComponent, FixEndpoint, FixConsumer, FixProducer, FixConfiguration, FixConstants), 3 generated configurer/factory classes, a Maven POM, service descriptors, and a component JSON descriptor. The component follows existing Camel patterns (studied camel-amqp, camel-dns, camel-docker, and camel-quickfix), uses QuickFIX/J as the FIX engine, and registers as module 'camel-fix' in the components paren
